name: Raspberry Glace Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake a 9-inch pie shell.
2. Mash enough raspberries to measure 1 cup.
3. Mix sugar and cornstarch in a 2-quart saucepan.
4. Gradually stir in water, food coloring, and mashed raspberries.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and boils.
6. Boil and stir for an additional minute; then cool.
7. Beat cream cheese until smooth.
8. Spread the cream cheese in the pie shell.
9. Fill the shell with remaining raspberries.
10. Pour the cooked raspberry mixture over the top.
11. Refrigerate for about 3 hours or until set.
